TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Zaid_Abdul-Aziz, title = Zaid_Abdul-Aziz, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Zaid_Abdul-Aziz} }

S.FORM: == Zaid Abdul-Aziz == Zaid Abdul-Aziz sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1946, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 4, Zaid Abdul-Aziz, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

== Zaid Abdul-Aziz == Zaid Abdul-Aziz sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1946, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 4, Zaid Abdul-Aziz, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == zai* aβ*ul-aziz == zai* aβ*ul-aziz s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, zai* aβ*ul-aziz, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
